title: Preserve Complete Tasks at High Zoom and Narrow Width
summary: Build and verify css zoom reflow in shift selection at four-hundred-percent zoom through prediction, inspection, explanation, cumulative code, and changed-case transfer.
objectives: Explain css zoom reflow from purpose, behavior, and evidence.
Apply css zoom reflow without discarding earlier valid work.
Diagnose the named misconception in changed content, input, and failure states.

steps.title: 04 · Read the shift selection at four-hundred-percent zoom case · theory
steps.instruction: Checkpoint 4: Which claim preserves css zoom reflow when data, input, and layout change? Scenario: shift selection at four-hundred-percent zoom.
steps.why: Preserve Complete Tasks at High Zoom and Narrow Width makes the decision observable and testable. This is checkpoint 4 in shift selection at four-hundred-percent zoom.

content.text: Browser zoom changes the effective CSS viewport and magnifies text, controls, spacing, and focus. Reflow requires content and workflows to remain available without two-dimensional page scrolling except for content that genuinely needs two dimensions. Relative sizes, wrapping, intrinsic constraints, and content-driven block growth outperform fixed desktop geometry. Apply it to shift selection at four-hundred-percent zoom.
